---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for memory-compiler
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / goal
What operator or runtime problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change
Describe the change you want.

## Why this belongs in memory-compiler
Explain why this should live here instead of in:
- OpenClaw core
- LCM / context engine
- memory-lancedb-pro
- external tooling

## Source / operator impact
How should this affect:
- source-first behavior
- control-plane visibility
- review / governance
- install / migration / publish surfaces

## Acceptance shape
What would count as done?

## Additional context
Links, examples, or prior art.
